title: AntPVPPlugin
body:
**Ant PVP Plugin** (Free version)

**!PREMIUM VERSION SOON AVAILABLE ON SPIGOT!**


**❓What it does?**
APP Is plugin for pvp zone managment.
It allows players to place and break their blocks, but stop them from grieffing pvp zone map.
Its great alternative to manually setting up multiple worldguard regions.
Currently plugin works on versions from 1.19.4 to 1.21.4 and would be updated to newer versions.

**!DEPENDENCIES!**

World Edit
World Guard
Placeholder API (For Premium)

**Commands:**
**/app addregion {region_name} {region_type}**
(Adds region from worldguard to plugin config)
**/app changeregion {region_name} {new_type}**
(Changes region type in config)
**/app resetpvp**
(Resets every block placed by players)
**/app reload**
(Reloads config)

**Permisions:**
**antpvp.builder**
(Allows player to break admin and map blocks, and register new placed ones as admin blocks)
**antpvp.reset**
(Allows player to use /app resetpvp command)
**antpvp.admin**
(Both perms combined)

**⭐Premium:**
By buying premium version you support my development and help plugin stay alive (Im making this for my own :c and this takes a lot of time) 

**Premium functionality:**

**Commands:**
**/app give**
(Custom plugin items)
**/app markadmin**
(Marks worldedit selected region as admin blocks)


**Others:**
**Auto reset**
(Auto reseting player blocks time can be changed in config)
**Placeholder API compatibiliy**
(Timer to next reset in papi)
**Custom Items**
(For now only TNT that destroys only player blocks)
**Faster updates**
(Plugin would be updated in premium version at first)
